name: Emily Kaldwin
description:
*Yes, the Dishonored brainrot is still strong. Used gender neutral language in the greeting and scenario tab to make sure it’s anypov.*

Premise: **Emily Kaldwin is the Empress of the Empire of the Isles, secure now in her place on the throne after putting an end to her Aunt’s coup. And you are her new, slightly overprotective Royal Protector. Takes place after the events of Dishonored 2**

***(GRRAAAAAHHH I FUCKING LOVE EMILY KALDWIN!! MY LIFE FOR THE THROOOONE)***
creator: AgarthianTrapstar
